report.summary: Built 2 new pages: Maple Finance ecosystem guide ($3.2B TVL institutional lending) and On-Chain Institutional Credit Markets learn guide ($18.9B market overview covering Maple, Goldfinch, Centrifuge, Clearpool)

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Identified Maple Finance as key gap — $3.2B TVL, 8x loan growth in 2025, SYRUP token at ~$0.27, Coinbase integration, multi-chain expansion to SOL/BNB
On-chain institutional credit market exceeds $18.9B active, $33.7B cumulative originations — no existing learn guide covered this sector
Competitive landscape mapped: Maple (institutional crypto-native), Goldfinch (emerging market/TradFi via Ares/Apollo), Centrifuge (RWA infrastructure), Clearpool (hybrid permissioned/composable)
Market catalysts: SEC-CFTC MOU (Mar 2026), Clarity Act progress, tokenized bank deposits (Cari Network on ZKsync), Qivalis euro stablecoin

sections.title: Content Created
items: Maple Finance ecosystem guide — protocol overview, how it works (pool delegates, syrup.fi), SYRUP tokenomics, growth trajectory table, risk analysis (credit/liquidity/concentration), competitive landscape comparison, TradingView chart, related guides, disclaimer

On-Chain Institutional Credit Markets learn guide — 7-section comprehensive guide with ToC, market size data, overcollateralized vs credit-based comparison table, 4 protocol deep dives, yield comparison table, 5 risk categories, market outlook, FAQ section (5 questions), structured data (article + FAQ schemas)

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: Learn guide: full Metadata export with title, description, keywords (12), OG tags, Twitter cards, canonical URL
Learn guide: Article structured data (JSON-LD) with wordCount, datePublished, dateModified
Learn guide: FAQ structured data (JSON-LD) with 5 Q&A pairs for rich snippets
Target keywords: 'onchain institutional credit 2026', 'maple finance lending', 'undercollateralized crypto lending', 'defi credit markets'
Ecosystem guide: client component with breadcrumb nav, internal links to 5 related pages
Cross-linking: Maple guide links to credit guide, credit guide links back to Maple; both link to stablecoin yield, Ethena, and DeFi lending guides

sections.title: Build Verification
items: TypeScript compilation: 0 errors in new files (pre-existing errors in other files unchanged)
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
Page structure matches existing ecosystem (Ethena pattern) and learn (stablecoin yield pattern) templates
